title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Jaypore

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Jaypore
jsonLd.description:
Jaypore invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jaypore:
Jaypore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore!
